title: Deathpit
overview: Retired pro-wrestler turned MMA veteran Jack "Horsepower" Silver is kidnapped and forced to fight in a underground tournament against the world's deadliest criminals. Will he unearth the truth, or will he be another victim of - DEATHPIT!!
